jokes.text: but we were already called greendale.
jokes.setup: Dean announces changing the school name to 'Envirodale' to be more earth-smart
jokes.punchline: Student points out they were already called Greendale, making the name change pointless
jokes.explanation: Simple but effective deflation of pompous announcements. Classic Community-style logical deconstruction.

jokes.text: eh, no. not really.
jokes.setup: Dean excitedly announces Green Day concert, expecting enthusiasm
jokes.punchline: Completely flat, unimpressed response deflates his excitement
jokes.explanation: Simple deflation humor, well-executed timing but not particularly memorable.

jokes.text: I'm trying to save the planet, here.
jokes.setup: Dean wants to reprint 5,000 more flyers after already printing 5,000
jokes.punchline: Claims he's saving the planet while literally doubling paper waste
jokes.explanation: Perfect character moment showing the Dean's obliviousness to irony. Well-crafted hypocrisy.

jokes.text: the consequences of questioning authority.
jokes.setup: Student questions why Annie doesn't have to write the essay
jokes.punchline: Chang escalates punishment by making the essay title a direct threat
jokes.explanation: Brilliant escalation that's both threatening and absurd. Perfect Chang character work.

jokes.text: oh, six pages on ignorance.
jokes.setup: Student claims limited Spanish knowledge
jokes.punchline: Chang turns the student's admission of ignorance into the essay topic while increasing length
jokes.explanation: Masterful escalation with perfect economy. The punishment fits the crime in an absurd way.

jokes.text: 20 pages on ass kissing!
jokes.setup: Britta tries to diplomatically calm Chang down
jokes.punchline: Chang punishes diplomacy by calling it ass-kissing and quadrupling the assignment
jokes.explanation: Perfect capstone to the escalation sequence. Chang's unpredictability is both funny and terrifying.

jokes.text: you know, if senor chang gets any crazier, He's gonna win one of those grammy awards.
jokes.setup: Chang's increasingly erratic behavior
jokes.punchline: Plays on 'Grammy' sounding like 'granny' - suggesting he'll win awards for being crazy
jokes.explanation: Decent wordplay but the pun doesn't quite land cleanly. Moderately clever but not sharp.

jokes.text: I choose not to be around rats because they are unpopular.
jokes.setup: Abed suggests Troy is afraid of rats
jokes.punchline: Troy's bizarre logic that he avoids rats due to social status rather than fear
jokes.explanation: Perfect Troy logic - completely absurd but delivered with total conviction. Highly quotable character moment.

jokes.text: Same goes for centipedes and lakes.
jokes.setup: Troy's explanation about avoiding unpopular animals
jokes.punchline: Extends the bizarre logic to include lakes (not even animals) in the 'unpopular' category
jokes.explanation: Great escalation that adds to Troy's absurd worldview. Lakes being unpopular is wonderfully bizarre.

jokes.text: i vote we all look at jeff at the same time.
jokes.setup: Group needs someone to talk to Chang
jokes.punchline: Annie acknowledges the sitcom trope of everyone turning to look at one character
jokes.explanation: Classic Community meta-humor, acknowledging TV conventions while participating in them.

jokes.text: yeah, go tongue chang.
jokes.setup: Discussion about Jeff's 'silver tongue' convincing Chang
jokes.punchline: Pierce makes it sexual and weird with terrible phrasing
jokes.explanation: Typical Pierce inappropriate comment. Works for character but not particularly clever.

jokes.text: wait, you are convincing!
jokes.setup: Jeff argues he can't convince Chang if he can't convince them not to make him do it
jokes.punchline: Annie realizes Jeff just successfully convinced them with that very argument
jokes.explanation: Clever logical twist that turns Jeff's argument against him. Good structural comedy.

jokes.text: I mean, that guy goes any more nuts, He's gonna win a grammy.
jokes.setup: Jeff repeating his earlier observation about Chang
jokes.punchline: Callback to the earlier Grammy/crazy pun
jokes.explanation: Callback doesn't improve the original joke. Feels like padding rather than enhancement.

jokes.text: well, guess what, handsome hobo. Your gravy train's leavin' the station.
jokes.setup: Jeff assumes the group will do his homework
jokes.punchline: Britta calls him a 'handsome hobo' and uses train metaphor for ending his easy ride
jokes.explanation: Good character moment for Britta. 'Handsome hobo' is a memorable insult.

jokes.text: But when you find my body, don't believe the suicide note.
jokes.setup: Jeff agrees to talk to Chang
jokes.punchline: Implies Chang will murder him and make it look like suicide
jokes.explanation: Dark humor that works well for Jeff's dramatic personality and Chang's threatening presence.

jokes.text: hmm. this better not awaken anything in me.
jokes.setup: Dean sees something (implied to be Chang in leather or bondage gear)
jokes.punchline: Dean's sexually suggestive response to whatever he's seeing
jokes.explanation: Iconic Dean line that became a cultural touchstone. Perfect character moment with lasting impact.

jokes.text: we're greene daeye.
jokes.setup: Knock-off band hired for Green Week
jokes.punchline: Terrible pun name combining 'Green Day' with 'green' theme, clearly not the real band
jokes.explanation: Decent visual gag about cheap school entertainment. Mildly amusing but not exceptional.

jokes.text: okay, freud.
jokes.setup: Jeff asks to ask a personal question
jokes.punchline: Chang sarcastically calls Jeff 'Freud' before agreeing to psychological analysis
jokes.explanation: Good character beat showing Chang's defensive sarcasm before vulnerability.

jokes.text: teaching us the word "esposa" means "liar."
jokes.setup: Jeff listing clues about Chang's marriage problems
jokes.punchline: Chang taught them that 'wife' means 'liar' - revealing his bitter feelings
jokes.explanation: Clever way to show character's emotional state through his teaching. Good integration of plot and character.

jokes.text: yeah. you look like you would have to.
jokes.setup: Chang brags about pleasuring his wife greatly
jokes.punchline: Jeff's deadpan response implies Chang looks like he'd need to compensate
jokes.explanation: Good deadpan delivery of an insult disguised as agreement. Classic Jeff manipulation.

jokes.text: I pleasured that woman greatly.
jokes.setup: Chang defending his masculinity in the divorce story
jokes.punchline: Awkward, overly formal way of describing sexual prowess
jokes.explanation: Perfect Chang line - inappropriate oversharing delivered with weird formality. Very quotable.

jokes.text: uh, are you offering or collecting?
jokes.setup: Chang offers 'pickled bull testicle'
jokes.punchline: Jeff questions whether Chang is offering food or asking Jeff to provide testicles
jokes.explanation: Sharp, economical joke with perfect ambiguity. Good callback to Jeff's quick wit.

jokes.text: [screams]
jokes.setup: Troy claims he's not afraid of rats while Abed opens the cage
jokes.punchline: Troy immediately screams in terror, contradicting his claim
jokes.explanation: Predictable physical comedy payoff but works well for Troy's character arc.

jokes.text: I'll kick all your asses! But y'all have to come up here!
jokes.setup: Troy is panicked and standing on furniture to avoid the rat
jokes.punchline: He threatens everyone while admitting he can't/won't come down to fight them
jokes.explanation: Good character comedy showing Troy's bravado undermined by his fear. Logically absurd threat.

jokes.text: essay canceled. sha-clackey.
jokes.setup: Chang decides to help Jeff after bonding
jokes.punchline: Made-up celebratory sound effect 'sha-clackey' to emphasize his decision
jokes.explanation: Silly made-up word that fits Chang's eccentric character. Mildly amusing but not outstanding.

jokes.text: oh, oh, i didn't say everybody. It's for my new friend jeff.
jokes.setup: Jeff celebrates thinking everyone gets relief from the essay
jokes.punchline: Chang clarifies only Jeff gets the exemption, creating awkward situation
jokes.explanation: Good misdirection that creates moral dilemma for Jeff. Sets up future conflict nicely.

jokes.text: You could do my homework next time. See you in class.
jokes.setup: Group offers to help Jeff with his essay after feeling guilty
jokes.punchline: Jeff casually reverses the usual dynamic, suggesting they do his work instead
jokes.explanation: Good character moment showing Jeff's selfishness masked as casual suggestion.

jokes.text: try to join the rest of us in reality, britta.
jokes.setup: Britta suggests the escaped rat is happy living with other rats
jokes.punchline: Shirley sarcastically tells Britta to be realistic while Britta was being optimistic
jokes.explanation: Decent character interaction. Shows Shirley's practical nature vs Britta's idealism.

jokes.text: Do you know anybody who reads from cards? No, you don't, and that's why.
jokes.setup: Pierce explaining why Annie can't use cards
jokes.punchline: Circular logic that makes no sense but sounds authoritative
jokes.explanation: Perfect Pierce logic - sounds wise but is complete nonsense delivered with total confidence.

jokes.text: whatever, valley girl.
jokes.setup: Annie argues that 'like' isn't always a filler word
jokes.punchline: Pierce dismisses her with an outdated insult that doesn't fit Annie
jokes.explanation: Typical Pierce inappropriate/outdated comment. Works for character but isn't particularly funny.

jokes.text: attention-grabbing words to wake up the audience Such as, uh, 'multiple orgasm.'
jokes.setup: Pierce suggesting attention-grabbing words for presentations
jokes.punchline: Inappropriate sexual example for Annie's business presentation
jokes.explanation: Classic Pierce inappropriate advice. Very in character but predictable territory.

jokes.text: no, you're not, abed.
jokes.setup: Chang calls Abed ugly in Spanish
jokes.punchline: Sweet, supportive response from classmate
jokes.explanation: Sweet moment that shows the class dynamics and provides contrast to Chang's cruelty.

jokes.text: Because, while both are dirty, Neither are my friends.
jokes.setup: Chang explains formal vs informal Spanish using Shakira and Tupac as examples
jokes.punchline: Calls both celebrities dirty and clarifies he's not friends with them
jokes.explanation: Good unexpected insult of celebrities during grammar lesson. Classic Chang inappropriate teaching.

jokes.text: cherry daiquiri!
jokes.setup: Chang and Jeff reminiscing about their night out
jokes.punchline: Chang enthusiastically recalls a cocktail name as a fond memory
jokes.explanation: Mild character moment showing Chang's enthusiasm for simple pleasures.

jokes.text: you devious clump Of overpriced fabric and hair product.
jokes.setup: Britta realizes Jeff betrayed the group
jokes.punchline: Creative insult reducing Jeff to his superficial components
jokes.explanation: Brilliant creative insult that captures both Jeff's vanity and Britta's activist vocabulary.

jokes.text: speaking as one of the meek, As soon as i inherit the earth, you a dead man.
jokes.setup: Group confronting Jeff about his betrayal
jokes.punchline: Abed references biblical quote about the meek inheriting the earth, then threatens murder
jokes.explanation: Perfect Abed line mixing pop culture knowledge with deadpan threat delivery. Highly quotable.

jokes.text: you got a weird forehead.
jokes.setup: Everyone giving Jeff elaborate insults
jokes.punchline: Troy's contribution is a simple, childish physical insult
jokes.explanation: Perfect Troy moment - while others get complex, he stays simple and direct. Good contrast.

jokes.text: it's all right, i've been divorced seven times. Don't answer your phones And bury all your money in the backyard.
jokes.setup: Jeff 'breaking up' with the group
jokes.punchline: Pierce's extensive divorce experience leading to specific advice
jokes.explanation: Good character revelation and practical advice from Pierce's extensive divorce experience.

jokes.text: and the saleswoman had manzanas gigante.
jokes.setup: Pierce reading his Spanish essay about taking a computer class
jokes.punchline: Pierce inappropriately comments on the saleswoman's breasts using Spanish
jokes.explanation: Typical Pierce inappropriate sexual comment. Works for character but is predictable.

jokes.text: Seven different women agreed to marry that guy.
jokes.setup: Group discussing Pierce's seven divorces
jokes.punchline: Shirley's amazement focuses on women agreeing to marry him rather than the divorces
jokes.explanation: Good perspective flip - focusing on the surprising positive rather than the obvious negative.

jokes.text: Let me rest gently on your pecs.
jokes.setup: Chang having emotional breakdown about his ex-wife
jokes.punchline: Inappropriately intimate request to lean on Jeff's chest muscles
jokes.explanation: Appropriately uncomfortable Chang moment. The specificity of 'pecs' makes it funnier.

jokes.text: you can't handle a moist towelette!
jokes.setup: Pierce giving presentation advice using Nicholson quotes
jokes.punchline: Terrible adaptation of 'You can't handle the truth!' to towelette marketing
jokes.explanation: Decent parody of famous movie line but the application is forced and not particularly clever.

jokes.text: Just don't let anybody know i was involved.
jokes.setup: Pierce gives Annie presentation advice
jokes.punchline: Asks for secrecy after giving terrible, inappropriate advice
jokes.explanation: Good Pierce moment - he knows his advice is bad but gives it anyway.

jokes.text: he's sitting in jeff's chair, So he's trying to act like jeff.
jokes.setup: Troy acting unusually dismissive and cool
jokes.punchline: Annie explains Troy's behavior change through sitcom chair psychology
jokes.explanation: Good meta observation about group dynamics and how physical space affects behavior.

jokes.text: real friends help me with things. Not vice versa.
jokes.setup: Troy channeling Jeff's selfishness while sitting in his chair
jokes.punchline: Completely selfish definition of friendship that perfectly mirrors Jeff
jokes.explanation: Perfect distillation of Jeff's selfish worldview delivered by Troy. Good character mirroring.

jokes.text: he gets any nuttier, they're gonna put him on the view.
jokes.setup: Troy continuing to channel Jeff while discussing Abed's behavior
jokes.punchline: Variation on Jeff's Grammy joke, escalating to daytime TV
jokes.explanation: Decent callback with Troy mimicking Jeff's joke style. Shows character copying but doesn't improve original.

jokes.text: By the way, they're not the real green day. Thought we should just rip that band-aid off quickly.
jokes.setup: Dean introduces the fake Green Day band
jokes.punchline: Casually admits they're not the real band after building them up
jokes.explanation: Good deflation humor. Dean's casual admission of deception is perfectly in character.

jokes.text: ms. bennett, i'm afraid i have to ask you To put down the cards.
jokes.setup: Annie trying to give presentation with note cards despite Pierce's advice
jokes.punchline: Professor enforces the no-cards rule, forcing Annie into her nightmare scenario
jokes.explanation: Good escalation of Annie's presentation anxiety. Sets up her breakdown effectively.

jokes.text: if you love brownies, you love life.
jokes.setup: Annie struggling through her presentation while rat chaos happens
jokes.punchline: Makes grandiose philosophical claim about brownies under pressure
jokes.explanation: Good cringe moment showing Annie's desperation. The overreach is believably awkward.

jokes.text: here's brownie!
jokes.setup: Annie's presentation completely falling apart with rat chaos
jokes.punchline: Reference to 'Here's Johnny!' from The Shining while holding brownies
jokes.explanation: Good pop culture reference that fits the moment. Shows Annie's complete breakdown.

jokes.text: although, winger, You should write a one-page essay called taking advantage of the emotionally-vulnerable.
jokes.setup: Chang thanks Jeff and cancels the group assignments
jokes.punchline: Immediately assigns Jeff a new essay with a title that perfectly describes what Jeff did
jokes.explanation: Perfect comeuppance for Jeff. The essay title perfectly describes his manipulation. Great character moment for Chang.

jokes.text: No more 20-page essays due on monday!
jokes.setup: Chang's public reconciliation speech
jokes.punchline: Canceling the impossible assignment that started the episode
jokes.explanation: Good resolution callback but more plot satisfaction than comedy.

jokes.text: [thud] booyah.
jokes.setup: Chang delivering his punishment for Jeff
jokes.punchline: Chang's celebratory 'booyah' with implied physical gesture (mic drop or similar)
jokes.explanation: Good punctuation to Chang's moment of triumph. Physical comedy enhances the verbal joke.

jokes.text: taking advantage of the emotionally-vulnerable.
jokes.setup: Chang giving Jeff one assignment
jokes.punchline: Self-aware title that describes exactly what Jeff did
jokes.explanation: Good self-aware moment where Chang acknowledges being manipulated while still punishing Jeff.

jokes.text: jeff, i'm sorry i called you a handsome hobo.
jokes.setup: Group reconciling with Jeff after he helped them
jokes.punchline: Britta apologizes for her earlier creative insult
jokes.explanation: Nice callback that shows character growth and group dynamics healing.

jokes.text: i know your secret. I know about the chair.
jokes.setup: Episode ending with Abed confronting Jeff privately
jokes.punchline: References the earlier chair psychology observation, suggesting deeper awareness
jokes.explanation: Good mysterious ending that references earlier meta-observation. Classic Abed awareness moment.

jokes.text: i know about the chair.
jokes.setup: Mysterious ending setup
jokes.punchline: Abed knowing about Dean's apparent furniture fetish
jokes.explanation: Good mysterious callback to the dean's earlier concerning comment. Classic Abed omniscience.

jokes.text: Oh, it's pepper water! oh, it's pep-- Who puts pepper in water?
jokes.setup: Paint ball fight scene with Pierce getting hit
jokes.punchline: Pierce's confused complaint about the paint composition while getting hit
jokes.explanation: Typical Pierce confusion in action sequence. Mild physical comedy but nothing special.
